title: teucrium flavum subsp. glaucum
intro: Teucrium flavum subsp. glaucum, also known as the Blue Germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium flavum plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Blue Germander include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Blue Germander can be consumed as a tea, or it can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be ingested or applied topically for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
